action_mappings.claim_source_account: claim source account {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.release_source_account: release source account {} from refund case {}

action_mappings.release_payment_gateway_reservation: release reservation of payment gateway {} for refund case {}

action_mappings.onboard_external_processor: onboard external processor {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.authorize_operator_for_case: authorize operator credential {} for refund case {} with payment gateway {}
action_mappings.reserve_settlement_window: reserve settlement window {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve liquidity bucket {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.release_liquidity_bucket: release refund case {} from liquidity bucket {}
action_mappings.reserve_payment_rail: reserve payment rail {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.release_payment_rail: release payment rail {} from refund case {}
action_mappings.reserve_settlement_service: reserve settlement service {} for refund case {}
action_mappings.release_settlement_service: release settlement service {} from refund case {}

action_mappings.release_payout_channel: release payout channel {} from refund case {}
action_mappings.compute_routing_and_prepare_clearing: compute routing and prepare clearing for refund case {} using currency {}, liquidity bucket {}, and payment rail {}
action_mappings.compute_routing_with_settlement_service: compute routing with settlement service for refund case {} using currency {}, settlement service {}, and prefund receipt {}
action_mappings.finalize_clearing_flags: finalize clearing flags for refund case {} using liquidity bucket {} and payment rail {}
action_mappings.apply_execution_priority: apply execution priority to refund case {} using liquidity bucket {}, payment rail {}, and priority token {}
action_mappings.apply_fallback_routing: apply fallback routing to refund case {} using settlement service {}, payout channel {}, and fallback token {}
action_mappings.transition_to_execution_ready: transition refund case {} to execution ready using liquidity bucket {} and payment rail {}
action_mappings.operator_authorize_for_execution: authorize operator for execution of refund case {} using payment gateway {} with operator credential {}
action_mappings.mark_gateway_invocation_candidate: mark refund case {} as gateway invocation candidate for payment gateway {}
action_mappings.mark_processor_gateway_invocation_candid: mark refund case {} as processor gateway invocation candidate for external processor {}

action_mappings.reserve_linked_case_settlement_window: reserve primary refund case {} and linked refund case {} for settlement window {}
action_mappings.publish_gateway_invocation: publish refund case {} for payment gateway {} using operator credential {}
action_mappings.finalize_settlement_for_linked_case: finalize settlement for refund case {} linked to the handle
action_mappings.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_window: finalize settlement for refund case {} within settlement window {}
action_mappings.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_invoca: finalize settlement for refund case {} with gateway invocation

action_mappings_indef.initiate_refund_case: initiate refund case a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.claim_source_account: claim a source account {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_source_account: release a source account {} from a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_payment_gateway: reserve a payment gateway {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payment_gateway_reservation: release reservation of a payment gateway {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_gateway_for_case: confirm a payment gateway {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.onboard_external_processor: onboard an external processor {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.authorize_operator_for_case: authorize an operator credential {} for a refund case {} with a payment gateway {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_settlement_window: reserve a settlement window {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve a liquidity bucket {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_liquidity_bucket: release a refund case {} from a liquidity bucket {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_payment_rail: reserve a payment rail {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payment_rail: release a payment rail {} from a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_settlement_service: reserve a settlement service {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_settlement_service: release a settlement service {} from a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_payout_channel: reserve a payout channel {} for a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payout_channel: release a payout channel {} from a refund case {}
action_mappings_indef.compute_routing_and_prepare_clearing: compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case {} using a currency {}, a liquidity bucket {}, and a payment rail {}
action_mappings_indef.compute_routing_with_settlement_service: compute routing with settlement service for a refund case {} using a currency {}, a settlement service {}, and a prefund receipt {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_clearing_flags: finalize clearing flags for a refund case {} using a liquidity bucket {} and a payment rail {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_execution_priority: apply execution priority to a refund case {} using a liquidity bucket {}, a payment rail {}, and a priority token {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_fallback_routing: apply fallback routing to a refund case {} using a settlement service {}, a payout channel {}, and a fallback token {}
action_mappings_indef.transition_to_execution_ready: transition a refund case {} to execution ready using a liquidity bucket {} and a payment rail {}
action_mappings_indef.operator_authorize_for_execution: authorize operator for execution of a refund case {} using a payment gateway {} with an operator credential {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_gateway_invocation_candidate: mark a refund case {} as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_processor_gateway_invocation_candid: mark a refund case {} as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor {}

action_mappings_indef.publish_gateway_invocation: publish a refund case {} for a payment gateway {} using an operator credential {}

action_mappings_indef.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_invoca: finalize settlement for a refund case {} with gateway invocation

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_source_account: the case {} is assigned to the source account {}
predicate_mappings.case_source_account_assigned_flag: the source account assigned flag for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_gateway_confirmed: the gateway is confirmed for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_operator_authorized: the operator is authorized for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_liquidity_assigned: the case {} is assigned to the liquidity bucket {}
predicate_mappings.case_rail_assigned: the case {} is assigned to the payment rail {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_service_assigned: the case {} is assigned to the settlement service {}
predicate_mappings.case_payout_channel_assigned: the case {} is assigned to the payout channel {}
predicate_mappings.case_currency_set: the currency for case {} is set to {}
predicate_mappings.case_routing_confirmed: case {} has been confirmed for routing
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_window_candidate: {} is a candidate for settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.settlement_window_available: {} is available as a settlement window
predicate_mappings.case_account_eligible: {} is eligible for a refund from {}
predicate_mappings.case_currency_eligible: {} is eligible for a refund in {}
predicate_mappings.case_liquidity_eligible: {} is eligible for a refund in {}
predicate_mappings.case_rail_eligible: {} is eligible for a refund through {}
predicate_mappings.case_prefund_receipt_eligible: {} is eligible for prefund receipt through {}
predicate_mappings.case_routing_profile_assigned: {} is assigned to the routing profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_window_candidate: {} is a candidate linked to the settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_window_allowed: {} is allowed in the settlement window {}

initiate_refund_case.description: initiate refund case a refund case A
preconditions: I can only initiate refund case a refund case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that case A is settled
effects: Once I initiate refund case a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

claim_source_account.description: claim a source account B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only claim a source account B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is eligible for a refund from B
I can only claim a source account B for a refund case A if it is not the case that the source account assigned flag for the case A
effects: Once I claim a source account B for a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the source account B and the source account assigned flag for the case A
Once I claim a source account B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_source_account.description: release a source account B from a refund case A
preconditions: I can only release a source account B from a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the source account B
I can only release a source account B from a refund case A if it is not the case that case A is ready for clearing and it is not the case that case A has been confirmed for routing
effects: Once I release a source account B from a refund case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a source account B from a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the source account B and it is not the case anymore that the source account assigned flag for the case A and it is not the case anymore that the gateway is confirmed for the case A and it is not the case anymore that the operator is authorized for the case A and it is not the case anymore that case processor engagement flag for A and it is not the case anymore that case execution is ready for A and it is not the case anymore that A is a confirmed prefund case

reserve_payment_gateway.description: reserve a payment gateway B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a payment gateway B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available as a gateway
effects: Once I reserve a payment gateway B for a refund case A, it is the case that A is a gateway reservation for B
Once I reserve a payment gateway B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a gateway

release_payment_gateway_reservation.description: release reservation of a payment gateway B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a payment gateway B for a refund case A if it is the case that A is a gateway reservation for B
effects: Once I release reservation of a payment gateway B for a refund case A, it is the case that B is available as a gateway
Once I release reservation of a payment gateway B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that A is a gateway reservation for B

confirm_gateway_for_case.description: confirm a payment gateway B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only confirm a payment gateway B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the source account assigned flag for the case A and A is a gateway reservation for B
I can only confirm a payment gateway B for a refund case A if it is not the case that the gateway is confirmed for the case A
effects: Once I confirm a payment gateway B for a refund case A, it is the case that the gateway is confirmed for the case A

onboard_external_processor.description: onboard an external processor B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only onboard an external processor B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the source account assigned flag for the case A and B is available as a processor
I can only onboard an external processor B for a refund case A if it is not the case that the gateway is confirmed for the case A
effects: Once I onboard an external processor B for a refund case A, it is the case that the gateway is confirmed for the case A and case processor engagement flag for A
Once I onboard an external processor B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a processor

authorize_operator_for_case.description: authorize an operator credential C for a refund case A with a payment gateway B
preconditions: I can only authorize an operator credential C for a refund case A with a payment gateway B if it is the case that the gateway is confirmed for the case A and the source account assigned flag for the case A and A is a gateway reservation for B and C is a valid operator credential
I can only authorize an operator credential C for a refund case A with a payment gateway B if it is not the case that the operator is authorized for the case A
effects: Once I authorize an operator credential C for a refund case A with a payment gateway B, it is the case that the operator is authorized for the case A
Once I authorize an operator credential C for a refund case A with a payment gateway B, it is not the case anymore that case processor engagement flag for A

reserve_settlement_window.description: reserve a settlement window B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a settlement window B for a refund case A if it is the case that the source account assigned flag for the case A and A is reserved for settlement window B
I can only reserve a settlement window B for a refund case A if it is not the case that the operator is authorized for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a settlement window B for a refund case A, it is the case that the operator is authorized for the case A
Once I reserve a settlement window B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that case processor engagement flag for A

reserve_liquidity_bucket.description: reserve a liquidity bucket B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a liquidity bucket B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B has liquidity available and A is eligible for a refund in B
effects: Once I reserve a liquidity bucket B for a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B
Once I reserve a liquidity bucket B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B has liquidity available

release_liquidity_bucket.description: release a refund case A from a liquidity bucket B
preconditions: I can only release a refund case A from a liquidity bucket B if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B
effects: Once I release a refund case A from a liquidity bucket B, it is the case that B has liquidity available
Once I release a refund case A from a liquidity bucket B, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B

reserve_payment_rail.description: reserve a payment rail B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a payment rail B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available for payment and A is eligible for a refund through B
effects: Once I reserve a payment rail B for a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payment rail B
Once I reserve a payment rail B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for payment

release_payment_rail.description: release a payment rail B from a refund case A
preconditions: I can only release a payment rail B from a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payment rail B
effects: Once I release a payment rail B from a refund case A, it is the case that B is available for payment
Once I release a payment rail B from a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the payment rail B

reserve_settlement_service.description: reserve a settlement service B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a settlement service B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available for settlement service and A is eligible for settlement through B
effects: Once I reserve a settlement service B for a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the settlement service B
Once I reserve a settlement service B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for settlement service

release_settlement_service.description: release a settlement service B from a refund case A
preconditions: I can only release a settlement service B from a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the settlement service B
effects: Once I release a settlement service B from a refund case A, it is the case that B is available for settlement service
Once I release a settlement service B from a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the settlement service B

reserve_payout_channel.description: reserve a payout channel B for a refund case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a payout channel B for a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an available payout channel and A is eligible for payout through B
effects: Once I reserve a payout channel B for a refund case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payout channel B
Once I reserve a payout channel B for a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available payout channel

release_payout_channel.description: release a payout channel B from a refund case A
preconditions: I can only release a payout channel B from a refund case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payout channel B
effects: Once I release a payout channel B from a refund case A, it is the case that B is an available payout channel
Once I release a payout channel B from a refund case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the payout channel B

compute_routing_and_prepare_clearing.description: compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case A using a currency B, a liquidity bucket C, and a payment rail D
preconditions: I can only compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case A using a currency B, a liquidity bucket C, and a payment rail D if it is the case that the source account assigned flag for the case A and the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket C and the case A is assigned to the payment rail D and B is supported and A is eligible for a refund in B
I can only compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case A using a currency B, a liquidity bucket C, and a payment rail D if it is not the case that case A is ready for clearing
effects: Once I compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case A using a currency B, a liquidity bucket C, and a payment rail D, it is the case that the currency for case A is set to B and case A is ready for clearing
Once I compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case A using a currency B, a liquidity bucket C, and a payment rail D, it is not the case anymore that B is supported

compute_routing_with_settlement_service.description: compute routing with settlement service for a refund case A using a currency B, a settlement service C, and a prefund receipt D
preconditions: I can only compute routing with settlement service for a refund case A using a currency B, a settlement service C, and a prefund receipt D if it is the case that the source account assigned flag for the case A and the case A is assigned to the settlement service C and D is a valid prefund receipt and B is supported and A is eligible for a refund in B and A is eligible for prefund receipt through D
I can only compute routing with settlement service for a refund case A using a currency B, a settlement service C, and a prefund receipt D if it is not the case that case A is ready for clearing
effects: Once I compute routing with settlement service for a refund case A using a currency B, a settlement service C, and a prefund receipt D, it is the case that the currency for case A is set to B and case A is ready for clearing and A is a confirmed prefund case and case processor engagement flag for A

Once I compute routing with settlement service for a refund case A using a currency B, a settlement service C, and a prefund receipt D, it is not the case anymore that B is supported and it is not the case anymore that D is a valid prefund receipt

finalize_clearing_flags.description: finalize clearing flags for a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C
preconditions: I can only finalize clearing flags for a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C if it is the case that case A is ready for clearing and A is a confirmed prefund case and the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B and the case A is assigned to the payment rail C
effects: Once I finalize clearing flags for a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C, it is not the case anymore that A is a confirmed prefund case and it is not the case anymore that case processor engagement flag for A

apply_execution_priority.description: apply execution priority to a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B, a payment rail C, and a priority token D
preconditions: I can only apply execution priority to a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B, a payment rail C, and a priority token D if it is the case that the operator is authorized for the case A and case A is ready for clearing and the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B and the case A is assigned to the payment rail C and A is assigned to the routing profile D

I can only apply execution priority to a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B, a payment rail C, and a priority token D if it is not the case that case processor engagement flag for A and it is not the case that case A has been confirmed for routing
effects: Once I apply execution priority to a refund case A using a liquidity bucket B, a payment rail C, and a priority token D, it is the case that case A has been confirmed for routing

apply_fallback_routing.description: apply fallback routing to a refund case A using a settlement service B, a payout channel C, and a fallback token D
preconditions: I can only apply fallback routing to a refund case A using a settlement service B, a payout channel C, and a fallback token D if it is the case that the operator is authorized for the case A and case A is ready for clearing and the case A is assigned to the settlement service B and the case A is assigned to the payout channel C and A is assigned to the routing profile D
I can only apply fallback routing to a refund case A using a settlement service B, a payout channel C, and a fallback token D if it is not the case that case A has been confirmed for routing
effects: Once I apply fallback routing to a refund case A using a settlement service B, a payout channel C, and a fallback token D, it is the case that case A has been confirmed for routing and case processor engagement flag for A

transition_to_execution_ready.description: transition a refund case A to execution ready using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C
preconditions: I can only transition a refund case A to execution ready using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C if it is the case that case A has been confirmed for routing and case processor engagement flag for A and the case A is assigned to the liquidity bucket B and the case A is assigned to the payment rail C
effects: Once I transition a refund case A to execution ready using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C, it is the case that case execution is ready for A

Once I transition a refund case A to execution ready using a liquidity bucket B and a payment rail C, it is not the case anymore that case processor engagement flag for A and it is not the case anymore that the operator is authorized for the case A and it is not the case anymore that A is a confirmed prefund case

operator_authorize_for_execution.description: authorize operator for execution of a refund case A using a payment gateway B with an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only authorize operator for execution of a refund case A using a payment gateway B with an operator credential C if it is the case that case execution is ready for A and case A has been confirmed for routing and the source account assigned flag for the case A and A is a gateway reservation for B and C is a valid operator credential
I can only authorize operator for execution of a refund case A using a payment gateway B with an operator credential C if it is not the case that the operator is authorized for the case A
effects: Once I authorize operator for execution of a refund case A using a payment gateway B with an operator credential C, it is the case that the operator is authorized for the case A

mark_gateway_invocation_candidate.description: mark a refund case A as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway B
preconditions: I can only mark a refund case A as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway B if it is the case that case A has been confirmed for routing and the operator is authorized for the case A and A is a gateway reservation for B

I can only mark a refund case A as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway B if it is not the case that case processor engagement flag for A and it is not the case that case A is pending invocation
effects: Once I mark a refund case A as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway B, it is the case that case A is pending invocation

mark_processor_gateway_invocation_candid.description: mark a refund case A as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor B
preconditions: I can only mark a refund case A as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor B if it is the case that case A has been confirmed for routing and the operator is authorized for the case A and B is available as a processor

I can only mark a refund case A as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor B if it is not the case that case processor engagement flag for A and it is not the case that case A is pending invocation
effects: Once I mark a refund case A as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor B, it is the case that case A is pending invocation
Once I mark a refund case A as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a processor

assign_settlement_window_for_execution.description: assign a refund case A to a settlement window B for execution
preconditions: I can only assign a refund case A to a settlement window B for execution if it is the case that case A is pending invocation and B is available as a settlement window and A is allowed in the settlement window B
effects: Once I assign a refund case A to a settlement window B for execution, it is the case that A is a candidate linked to the settlement window B
Once I assign a refund case A to a settlement window B for execution, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a settlement window

reserve_linked_case_settlement_window.description: reserve a primary refund case A and a linked refund case B for a settlement window C
preconditions: I can only reserve a primary refund case A and a linked refund case B for a settlement window C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is the primary handle and A is a candidate for settlement window C and B is a candidate linked to the settlement window C
I can only reserve a primary refund case A and a linked refund case B for a settlement window C if it is not the case that A is reserved for settlement window C
effects: Once I reserve a primary refund case A and a linked refund case B for a settlement window C, it is the case that A is reserved for settlement window C

publish_gateway_invocation.description: publish a refund case A for a payment gateway B using an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only publish a refund case A for a payment gateway B using an operator credential C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is the primary handle and the operator is authorized for the case A and case A is pending invocation and A is a gateway reservation for B and C is a valid operator credential
I can only publish a refund case A for a payment gateway B using an operator credential C if it is not the case that A is published for gateway invocation
effects: Once I publish a refund case A for a payment gateway B using an operator credential C, it is the case that A is published for gateway invocation

finalize_settlement_for_linked_case.description: finalize settlement for a refund case A linked to the handle
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A linked to the handle if it is the case that A is linked to the handle and the case A is registered and the source account assigned flag for the case A and case A is ready for clearing and case A has been confirmed for routing and case A is pending invocation and the operator is authorized for the case A
I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A linked to the handle if it is not the case that case A is settled
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a refund case A linked to the handle, it is the case that case A is settled

finalize_settlement_for_case_with_window.description: finalize settlement for a refund case A within a settlement window B
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A within a settlement window B if it is the case that A is the primary handle and the case A is registered and the source account assigned flag for the case A and case A is ready for clearing and case A has been confirmed for routing and case A is pending invocation and the operator is authorized for the case A and A is reserved for settlement window B
I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A within a settlement window B if it is not the case that case A is settled
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a refund case A within a settlement window B, it is the case that case A is settled

finalize_settlement_for_case_with_invoca.description: finalize settlement for a refund case A with gateway invocation
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A with gateway invocation if it is the case that A is the primary handle and the case A is registered and the source account assigned flag for the case A and case A is ready for clearing and case A has been confirmed for routing and case A is pending invocation and the operator is authorized for the case A and A is published for gateway invocation
I can only finalize settlement for a refund case A with gateway invocation if it is not the case that case A is settled
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a refund case A with gateway invocation, it is the case that case A is settled

action_nl_templates.claim_source_account: claim source account {?source_account} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_source_account: release source account {?source_account} from refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_payment_gateway: reserve payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payment_gateway_reservation: release reservation of payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_gateway_for_case: confirm payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.onboard_external_processor: onboard external processor {?external_processor} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.authorize_operator_for_case: authorize operator credential {?operator_credential} for refund case {?refund_case} with payment gateway {?payment_gateway}
action_nl_templates.reserve_settlement_window: reserve settlement window {?settlement_window} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_liquidity_bucket: release refund case {?refund_case} from liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates.reserve_payment_rail: reserve payment rail {?payment_rail} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payment_rail: release payment rail {?payment_rail} from refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_settlement_service: reserve settlement service {?settlement_service} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_settlement_service: release settlement service {?settlement_service} from refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_payout_channel: reserve payout channel {?payout_channel} for refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payout_channel: release payout channel {?payout_channel} from refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates.compute_routing_and_prepare_clearing: compute routing and prepare clearing for refund case {?refund_case} using currency {?currency}, liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, and payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates.compute_routing_with_settlement_service: compute routing with settlement service for refund case {?refund_case} using currency {?currency}, settlement service {?settlement_service}, and prefund receipt {?prefund_receipt}
action_nl_templates.finalize_clearing_flags: finalize clearing flags for refund case {?refund_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates.apply_execution_priority: apply execution priority to refund case {?refund_case} using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, payment rail {?payment_rail}, and priority token {?priority_token}
action_nl_templates.apply_fallback_routing: apply fallback routing to refund case {?refund_case} using settlement service {?settlement_service}, payout channel {?payout_channel}, and fallback token {?fallback_token}
action_nl_templates.transition_to_execution_ready: transition refund case {?refund_case} to execution ready using liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates.operator_authorize_for_execution: authorize operator for execution of refund case {?refund_case} using payment gateway {?payment_gateway} with operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates.mark_gateway_invocation_candidate: mark refund case {?refund_case} as gateway invocation candidate for payment gateway {?payment_gateway}
action_nl_templates.mark_processor_gateway_invocation_candid: mark refund case {?refund_case} as processor gateway invocation candidate for external processor {?external_processor}
action_nl_templates.assign_settlement_window_for_execution: assign refund case {?refund_case} to settlement window {?settlement_window} for execution
action_nl_templates.reserve_linked_case_settlement_window: reserve primary refund case {?primary_refund_case} and linked refund case {?linked_refund_case} for settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.publish_gateway_invocation: publish refund case {?refund_case} for payment gateway {?payment_gateway} using operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_for_linked_case: finalize settlement for refund case {?refund_case} linked to the handle
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_window: finalize settlement for refund case {?refund_case} within settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_invoca: finalize settlement for refund case {?refund_case} with gateway invocation

predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_source_account: the case {?refund_case} is assigned to the source account {?source_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_source_account_assigned_flag: the source account assigned flag for the case {?refund_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_gateway_confirmed: the gateway is confirmed for the case {?refund_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_operator_authorized: the operator is authorized for the case {?refund_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_liquidity_assigned: the case {?refund_case} is assigned to the liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
predicate_nl_templates.case_rail_assigned: the case {?refund_case} is assigned to the payment rail {?payment_rail}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_service_assigned: the case {?refund_case} is assigned to the settlement service {?settlement_service}
predicate_nl_templates.case_payout_channel_assigned: the case {?refund_case} is assigned to the payout channel {?payout_channel}
predicate_nl_templates.case_currency_set: the currency for case {?refund_case} is set to {?currency}
predicate_nl_templates.case_routing_confirmed: case {?refund_case} has been confirmed for routing
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_window_candidate: {?refund_case} is a candidate for settlement window {?settlement_window}
predicate_nl_templates.settlement_window_available: {?settlement_window} is available as a settlement window
predicate_nl_templates.case_account_eligible: {?refund_case} is eligible for a refund from {?source_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_currency_eligible: {?refund_case} is eligible for a refund in {?currency}
predicate_nl_templates.case_liquidity_eligible: {?refund_case} is eligible for a refund in {?liquidity_bucket}
predicate_nl_templates.case_rail_eligible: {?refund_case} is eligible for a refund through {?payment_rail}
predicate_nl_templates.case_prefund_receipt_eligible: {?refund_case} is eligible for prefund receipt through {?prefund_receipt}
predicate_nl_templates.case_routing_profile_assigned: {?refund_case} is assigned to the routing profile {?routing_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_window_candidate: {?refund_case} is a candidate linked to the settlement window {?settlement_window}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_window_allowed: {?refund_case} is allowed in the settlement window {?settlement_window}

action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_refund_case: initiate refund case a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.claim_source_account: claim a source account {?source_account} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_source_account: release a source account {?source_account} from a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_payment_gateway: reserve a payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payment_gateway_reservation: release reservation of a payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_gateway_for_case: confirm a payment gateway {?payment_gateway} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.onboard_external_processor: onboard an external processor {?external_processor} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_operator_for_case: authorize an operator credential {?operator_credential} for a refund case {?refund_case} with a payment gateway {?payment_gateway}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_settlement_window: reserve a settlement window {?settlement_window} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_liquidity_bucket: reserve a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_liquidity_bucket: release a refund case {?refund_case} from a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_payment_rail: reserve a payment rail {?payment_rail} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payment_rail: release a payment rail {?payment_rail} from a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_settlement_service: reserve a settlement service {?settlement_service} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_settlement_service: release a settlement service {?settlement_service} from a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_payout_channel: reserve a payout channel {?payout_channel} for a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payout_channel: release a payout channel {?payout_channel} from a refund case {?refund_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.compute_routing_and_prepare_clearing: compute routing and prepare clearing for a refund case {?refund_case} using a currency {?currency}, a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, and a payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.compute_routing_with_settlement_service: compute routing with settlement service for a refund case {?refund_case} using a currency {?currency}, a settlement service {?settlement_service}, and a prefund receipt {?prefund_receipt}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_clearing_flags: finalize clearing flags for a refund case {?refund_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and a payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_execution_priority: apply execution priority to a refund case {?refund_case} using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket}, a payment rail {?payment_rail}, and a priority token {?priority_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_fallback_routing: apply fallback routing to a refund case {?refund_case} using a settlement service {?settlement_service}, a payout channel {?payout_channel}, and a fallback token {?fallback_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.transition_to_execution_ready: transition a refund case {?refund_case} to execution ready using a liquidity bucket {?liquidity_bucket} and a payment rail {?payment_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.operator_authorize_for_execution: authorize operator for execution of a refund case {?refund_case} using a payment gateway {?payment_gateway} with an operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_gateway_invocation_candidate: mark a refund case {?refund_case} as gateway invocation candidate for a payment gateway {?payment_gateway}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_processor_gateway_invocation_candid: mark a refund case {?refund_case} as processor gateway invocation candidate for an external processor {?external_processor}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_settlement_window_for_execution: assign a refund case {?refund_case} to a settlement window {?settlement_window} for execution
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_linked_case_settlement_window: reserve a primary refund case {?primary_refund_case} and a linked refund case {?linked_refund_case} for a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.publish_gateway_invocation: publish a refund case {?refund_case} for a payment gateway {?payment_gateway} using an operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_for_linked_case: finalize settlement for a refund case {?refund_case} linked to the handle
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_window: finalize settlement for a refund case {?refund_case} within a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_for_case_with_invoca: finalize settlement for a refund case {?refund_case} with gateway invocation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a refund case or a source account or a currency or a payment rail or a liquidity bucket or a settlement service or a payment gateway or a external processor or a settlement window or a operator credential or a prefund receipt or a payout channel or a routing profile is also a entity
Everything that is a priority token or a fallback token is also a routing profile
Everything that is a linked refund case or a primary refund case is also a refund case
